folio.label: 95r
folio.l: ¢ Vp on Grisilde , this poore creature
Ful often sithes , this Markys sette his eye
As he on huntyngö rod , ¹auenture
And whan it fel , that he mygút hire a spye
He nougút , witú wantoun lokyngö , of folye
His eyen cast on hire , but in sad wyse
Vp on hire chere , he wold hi~ oft avyse
¢ Commendynge in his hert , hire wommanhede
And eke hire vertue , passyngö any wygút
Of so ©onge age , as wel in cheer as dede
For thougú the peeple , haue no gret insygút
In vertue , he considered ful rigút
Hire bounte , and disposed that he wolde
Wedde hire oonly , if euäe he wedde shulde
¢ The day of weddynge cam , but no wygút can
Telle what womman , that it shulde be
For whicú meruayle , wondretú many a man
And seyden , whan they weren , in preuyte
Wyl nat oure lord , ©et leuen his vanyte
Wyl he nat wedde , allas allas the whyle
Why wyl he thus , hym self , and vs begyle
¢ But nathelees this Markys , hatú don make
Of gemmes , sette in gold , and in Asure
Broches and rynges , for Grisildes sake
And of hire clothynge , toke he the mesure
Of a Mayden , lyke , vn to hire stature
And eke of othere , ornamentis alle
That vn to swicú a weddynge , shulde falle
¢ The tyme of vnderne , of the same day
Approchetú , that this weddynge , shulde be
And al the paleys , put was in a ray
Bothe halle and chaumbres , eche in his degree
Houses of office , stuffed witú plentee
There maist æè se , of deynteuous vetaille

That may xx xxxxxbe foundexxxxxxxxx be founde , as fer as lastetú ytaillebe founde266These two words appear to have been written over an erasure.Estbe founde266 be is written on an erasure and the dots refer to the word which was cancelled.ODR
¢ This ryal Markys , richely arayed
Lordes and ladyes , in his companye
The whicú , vn to the feest , were I preyed
And of his retenue , the bachelerye
Witú many a soun , of sondry melodye
Vn to the village , of the whicú I tolde
In this array , the rigút weye they holde
¢ Grisilde of this , god wot ful Innocent
That for hire shapen was , al this array
To fecchen water , at a welle is went
